title: Debris Sweep Cordon: Additive-Basis Depot Placement
strategies: arithmetic-progression cordon: occupy slots 0,1,...,n-1; the sum set is the contiguous block [0,2n-2] so the cleared band is exactly the baseline reach 2n-2
gap-covering additive-basis greedy (Stohr / Mian-Chowla flavour): keep the covered prefix contiguous and add the depot slot that pushes the first uncovered slot furthest, ties -> smallest slot
randomized-restart greedy: break ties among equally-best slots randomly under a fixed seed, run many restarts and keep the longest cleared band -> escapes the single greedy trajectory
algebraic near-extremal 2-basis constructions (two-block Rohrbach/Mrose bases, small-block + arithmetic-step scaffolds) that provably cover a long interval with few slots
